name: bump-name-match
title: Bump Name Match
description: Discover name meanings, origins, and more - then match your favorite baby names with your partner
author: Rob

commands.name: search-names
commands.title: Search Names
commands.subtitle: BumpNameMatch
commands.description: Search baby names and view their details

commands.name: my-lists
commands.title: My Lists
commands.subtitle: BumpNameMatch
commands.description: Browse your favorite lists and manage saved names

commands.name: search-origins
commands.title: Search by Origin
commands.subtitle: BumpNameMatch
commands.description: Browse names by cultural origin, optionally filtered by gender

commands.name: naming-sessions
commands.title: Naming Sessions
commands.subtitle: BumpNameMatch
commands.description: Vote on names with your partner and see your matches

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Personal API key used to save names to your favorite lists and view them in My Lists. Create one at https://bumpnamematch.com/dashboard/api-keys
